proposed_work: Construction of new primary school building (6 classrooms) with playground and boundary wall
justification_notes: Ward 4 schools operating at 180% capacity. Student-teacher ratio 58:1 (state avg 30:1). Nearest alternative school 12.3 km away. Multiple parent complaints on record.

proposed_work: Construction of additional school wing (4 classrooms) in existing Green Valley Public School
justification_notes: Anticipating population growth in new residential zone. Current school at 42% capacity but developer projections suggest demand in 3-5 years.

proposed_work: Resurfacing and widening of Main Street (2.4 km stretch from Town Hall to Bus Stand)
justification_notes: Road condition index 0.28 (critical). 14.5 potholes/km. Handles 18,500 vehicles/day - well above design capacity of 8,000.

proposed_work: Installation of new 500 KLD water treatment plant and 8 km pipeline network
justification_notes: Only 38% households have water connections. Average supply 2.5 hours/day vs state target of 12 hours. 4.8 km of open drains.
plan_source: Jal Jeevan Mission - District Implementation Plan 2025

proposed_work: Installation of 2x 250 KVA transformers and replacement of 3.2 km feeder line
justification_notes: Existing transformers at 142% load. Average 6.2 hours daily outage. 55% of streetlights non-functional.
plan_source: State Electricity Board - Distribution Improvement Plan 2025

proposed_work: Upgradation of Primary Health Centre to Community Health Centre (30-bed facility)
justification_notes: Only 0.3 beds per 1000 population (national norm: 2.0). Nearest hospital 8.7 km away. High infant mortality rate in ward.
plan_source: National Health Mission - District Health Action Plan 2025-26

proposed_work: Door-to-door waste collection system with 3 compactor vehicles and micro-composting centre
justification_notes: Only 52% waste collection coverage. 7 open dump sites in residential areas. Tourist heritage zone with sanitation complaints.
plan_source: Swachh Bharat Mission - Urban Local Body Action Plan 2025

proposed_work: Construction of 2 km storm water drain along Green Valley Main Road
justification_notes: New residential zone prone to waterlogging during monsoon. No existing storm water infrastructure.
